caption: A man with glasses and a tall, pointed grey wig sits in a recording studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and light-colored suspenders. He wears black headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous small framed photographs. A white shelf holds various items, including a piece of clothing with "LEE" printed on it. On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" featuring a red microphone icon. Throughout the sequence, the man is captured mid-speech, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head as he talks. In the final frame, he raises his right hand, gesturing with his fingers to emphasize a point while continuing to look toward the side of the frame.
